---
title: " "
pagetitle: "Miquel Sirera Perelló"
description-meta: "PhD student at Northeastern · LLMs, distributed systems, edge AI."
page-layout: full
toc: false
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <meta property="og:title" content="Miquel Sirera Perelló">
    <meta property="og:description" content="PhD student at Northeastern building distributed LLMs that survive node failures, run on the edge, and stay accurate.">
    <meta property="og:image" content="files/headshot_new.jpg">
---

```{=html}
<!-- ============================================================
     HERO
     ============================================================ -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-grid">
    <div class="hero-left">
      <div class="hero-eyebrow">
        <span class="live-dot"></span>
        <span>Open to collaboration · Boston, MA</span>
      </div>

      <h1 class="hero-title">
        Building
        <span class="accent">resilient</span><br>
        distributed&nbsp;LLMs.
      </h1>

      <p class="hero-tagline">
        I'm Miquel — a PhD student at <strong>Northeastern</strong>
        working on large language models that survive node failures,
        run on the edge, and stay accurate under real-world constraints.
      </p>

      <div class="hero-cta">
        <a class="btn-pill primary" href="./research.qmd">
          See my research <span class="arrow">→</span>
        </a>
        <a class="btn-pill ghost" href="mailto:sirera.m@northeastern.edu">
          Get in touch
        </a>
      </div>

      <div class="hero-meta">
        <div class="hero-meta-item">
          <span class="hero-meta-label">Lab</span>
          <span class="hero-meta-value">Genesys · Northeastern</span>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-meta-item">
          <span class="hero-meta-label">Focus</span>
          <span class="hero-meta-value">Distributed AI · Edge</span>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-meta-item">
          <span class="hero-meta-label">Since</span>
          <span class="hero-meta-value">2024</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-right">
      <div class="hero-portrait">
        <img src="files/hero_angle.png" alt="Miquel Sirera">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============================================================
     INTRO BAND
     ============================================================ -->
<section class="intro-band">
  <p class="intro-copy">
    I work at the intersection of <strong>machine learning</strong> and <strong>distributed systems</strong>.
    Models are getting larger; the devices that need to run them aren't.
    My research is about closing that gap — keeping inference fast, reliable, and accurate when the
    compute is spread across many nodes that can fail at any moment.
  </p>
</section>

<!-- ============================================================
     PROJECTS
     ============================================================ -->
<section class="section">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <header class="section-head">
      <div class="section-label">/ work</div>
      <div>
        <h2 class="section-title">What I'm <span class="accent">working on.</span></h2>
        <p class="section-lede">
          Three threads, all aimed at making large models practical when compute is distributed,
          unreliable, or sitting on devices at the edge.
        </p>
      </div>
    </header>

    <div class="projects">
      <a href="./research.qmd" class="project-row">
        <div class="project-num">01</div>
        <div class="project-content">
          <h3>Resilience for Distributed LLMs</h3>
          <p>Extending JARVIS, a framework that splits LLM layers across edge devices. We add peer-to-peer recovery and layer redundancy so the system keeps serving when nodes fail. Tested on Gemma-2B across 18 software-defined radios in the NSF Colosseum emulator and a 7-node Raspberry Pi cluster.</p>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">LLM inference</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Fault tolerance</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Edge AI</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="project-arrow">→</div>
      </a>

      <a href="https://ece.northeastern.edu/fac-ece/ioannidis/static/pdf/2023/C_Jian_CommAwarePrune_Infocom2023.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="project-row">
        <div class="project-num">02</div>
        <div class="project-content">
          <h3>Communication-aware DNN pruning</h3>
          <p>Training networks for distributed deployment so they need less inter-device communication while staying accurate. Pruning and placing neurons in CNNs and MLPs so they run well on the edge under mixed network conditions.</p>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">Model compression</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Networking</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="project-arrow">→</div>
      </a>

      <div class="project-row">
        <div class="project-num">03</div>
        <div class="project-content">
          <h3>Knowledge editing in LLMs</h3>
          <p>Looking at more efficient ways to update or correct specific facts and behaviors inside large language models — without full retraining, and without breaking everything else the model knows.</p>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">Model editing</span>
            <span class="project-tag">LLMs</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="project-arrow">→</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============================================================
     BACKGROUND (compact timeline)
     ============================================================ -->
<section class="section" style="border-top: 1px solid var(--border);">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <header class="section-head">
      <div class="section-label">/ background</div>
      <div>
        <h2 class="section-title">The <span class="accent">path</span> here.</h2>
        <p class="section-lede">From data science in Barcelona to distributed LLMs in Boston.</p>
      </div>
    </header>

    <div class="timeline">
      <div class="tl-row">
        <div class="tl-date">2024 — Present</div>
        <div class="tl-content">
          <h3>PhD, Computer Engineering</h3>
          <p class="tl-place">Northeastern University · Boston</p>
          <p class="tl-body">Distributed LLMs, edge AI, and resilient inference. Advised in the Genesys lab.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-row">
        <div class="tl-date">2023</div>
        <div class="tl-content">
          <h3>Undergraduate Research Assistant</h3>
          <p class="tl-place">Genesys Lab, Northeastern · Boston</p>
          <p class="tl-body">Bachelor's thesis on AI for wireless — signal classification with deep models. Hooked me on AI + wireless and started my path here.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-row">
        <div class="tl-date">2022</div>
        <div class="tl-content">
          <h3>AI Engineer Intern</h3>
          <p class="tl-place">Abi Global Health · Remote</p>
          <p class="tl-body">MLOps monitoring and ML model work for a global tele-health platform.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-row">
        <div class="tl-date">2019 — 2023</div>
        <div class="tl-content">
          <h3>BSc, Data Science &amp; Engineering</h3>
          <p class="tl-place">Universitat Politècnica de Catalunya · Barcelona</p>
          <p class="tl-body">GPA 8.89/10. Honors in Discrete Math &amp; Logic, Mathematical Optimization, Search &amp; Analysis of Information, and Advanced Topics of Data Science.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============================================================
     CONTACT CTA
     ============================================================ -->
<section class="contact-cta">
  <div class="contact-eyebrow">/ Get in touch</div>
  <h2>Let's build something <span class="accent">interesting.</span></h2>
  <p>Always happy to talk about distributed ML, edge inference, or how to make models survive the real world.</p>
  <div class="hero-cta" style="justify-content:center;">
    <a class="btn-pill primary" href="mailto:sirera.m@northeastern.edu">
      sirera.m@northeastern.edu
    </a>
    <a class="btn-pill ghost" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/mqsirera/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      LinkedIn <span class="arrow">→</span>
    </a>
  </div>
</section>
```
